doc: Switchable state holder for the mode toggle action. No own action control. Switches between ViewModeState (default) and EditModeState based on editor mode. Reads isEditMode from ancestor TreeEditor on refresh().

children.doc: Default state for the 'Edit mode' action. On user activation, requests TreeEditor to toggle editor mode.
Active edit state for the 'View mode' action. On user activation, requests TreeEditor to toggle editor mode.
